sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_multiply_decimal (a Decimal64(5), b Decimal32(4), result Decimal256);
INSERT INTO test_multiply_decimal VALUES (toDecimal64(15.5, 2), toDecimal32(3.2, 2), multiplyDecimal(toDecimal64(15.5, 2), toDecimal32(3.2, 2)));
UPDATE test_multiply_decimal SET result = multiplyDecimal(a, b) WHERE a < 0;
SELECT a, b, result FROM test_multiply_decimal WHERE result > 50.0;
